criteria.name: Verbal Clarity
criteria.description: Can the candidate express thoughts clearly and concisely?

scores.3: Adequate - Generally clear with occasional tangents
scores.5: Excellent - Structured, articulate, easy to follow

criteria.name: Listening
criteria.description: Does the candidate listen carefully and respond to what was asked?

scores.1: Poor - Frequently misses or ignores the question
scores.5: Excellent - Attentive, asks clarifying questions when needed

criteria.name: Analytical Thinking
criteria.description: Can the candidate break down problems logically?

scores.1: Poor - No structured approach to problem solving
scores.3: Adequate - Can reason through simple problems
scores.5: Excellent - Strong analytical framework, considers edge cases

criteria.name: Creativity
criteria.description: Does the candidate offer novel or thoughtful approaches?

scores.1: Poor - Only gives obvious or generic answers
scores.3: Adequate - Some original thinking with prompting

criteria.name: Interest in the Role
criteria.description: Does the candidate show genuine interest in the position?

scores.3: Adequate - Basic understanding of the role
scores.5: Excellent - Researched the company, asks insightful questions

criteria.name: Growth Mindset
criteria.description: Is the candidate open to learning and self-improvement?

scores.3: Adequate - Willing to learn but passive about it
scores.5: Excellent - Actively seeks growth, gives specific examples

criteria.name: Collaboration
criteria.description: Does the candidate work well with others?

scores.1: Poor - Prefers isolation, dismissive of teamwork
scores.3: Adequate - Works with others when required
scores.5: Excellent - Thrives in collaborative environments, gives examples

criteria.name: Professionalism
criteria.description: Does the candidate present themselves professionally?
